title: English Connectors Practice
description: Choose the correct connector to complete each sentence. Practice addition, sequence, emphasis, and contrast connectors.

questions.question: The weather was terrible; ______, we decided to go hiking anyway.
She didn't like the food; ______, she finished her plate.
We packed our bags; ______, we left for the airport.
He practiced every day; ______, he won the competition.
The room was large; ______, it had a beautiful view.
The meeting started late; ______, we finished all tasks on time.
She studied hard for the exam; ______, she felt confident about it.
The movie was boring; ______, the acting was excellent.
We enjoyed the concert; ______, the tickets were expensive.
He is very talented; ______, he works harder than anyone else.
The project was challenging; ______, the team completed it successfully.
______, we need to review the budget before making decisions.
She speaks three languages; ______, she's learning a fourth one.
The restaurant was crowded; ______, we found a table quickly.
______, the presentation was well-received by everyone.
He seemed calm; ______, he was extremely nervous inside.
The plan worked perfectly; ______, everyone was satisfied with the results.
They arrived late; ______, they didn't miss the main event.
The task seemed impossible; ______, we managed to complete it.
She loves reading; ______, she enjoys writing her own stories.
______, he decided to accept the job offer after careful consideration.
The instructions were clear; ______, many people still had questions.
She is talented; ______, she is one of the best singers I know.
The exam was difficult; ______, most students passed with good grades.
We can go to the beach; ______, we could visit the museum.
The concert was amazing; ______, the sound quality was perfect.
He worked all night; ______, he finished the report on time.
The hotel was expensive; ______, it offered excellent service.
She prefers coffee; ______, her sister likes tea better.
The game was exciting; ______, the final minutes were incredible.
______, the project exceeded all our expectations.
The solution was simple; ______, nobody had thought of it before.
He is hardworking; ______, he never complains about difficult tasks.
The journey was long; ______, we arrived safely at our destination.
______, everyone agreed that the event was a great success.
She is intelligent; ______, she has a great sense of humor.
The performance was outstanding; ______, it received a standing ovation.
They were exhausted; ______, they continued working until midnight.
The price was high; ______, the quality justified the cost.
He appeared confident; ______, he was feeling quite uncertain.
______, we decided to postpone the meeting until next week.
The book was interesting; ______, the ending was disappointing.
She loves traveling; ______, exploring new cultures fascinates her.
The team won the championship; ______, they celebrated with a party.
______, let me explain the main points of the presentation.
The assignment was complex; ______, the students completed it well.
He enjoys swimming; ______, he goes to the pool every morning.
The flight was delayed; ______, we still made our connection.
______, we should discuss the budget before finalizing the plans.
The weather improved; ______, we went ahead with the outdoor event.
She is creative; ______, she has excellent technical skills too.
The deadline was tight; ______, the team delivered quality work.
______, this has been one of our most productive years.
He claimed to be an expert; ______, he made several mistakes.
The proposal was rejected; ______, we learned valuable lessons from it.
She is dedicated; ______, she always goes the extra mile.
The presentation was clear; ______, everyone understood the key points.
They faced many obstacles; ______, they never gave up hope.
______, we need to acknowledge everyone's contribution to this project.
The restaurant was busy; ______, the service remained excellent.
